name: 06a - Realistic SQL-Primitives Coverage
description: 20 questions, one per major SQL primitive — coverage matrix for SELECT, PROJECT (default-cols), FILTER (value + name lookup), GROUP BY, HAVING, ORDER BY, LIMIT (top N), JOIN (FK + M:M + ANTI), DATE (relative + absolute), DISTINCT, IS NULL, BOOL flag, LIKE, IN-list, CASE-WHEN ratio, multi-dim GROUP BY, refinement, clarification trigger. Every scenario has ExpectedSql so EX (Execution Accuracy) is computed. Domain-agnostic content — phrasing not tied to any single table.

Scenarios.Question: List tickets.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Show me tickets with status 'Open'.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title, s.Name AS Status FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets are currently open?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS [Count] FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Count tickets per status.
Scenarios.Category: GROUP BY single dim (count by lookup)
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT s.Name AS Status, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY s.Name ORDER BY Cnt DESC

Scenarios.Question: Show ticket counts grouped by status and priority.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT s.Name AS Status, p.Name AS Priority, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY s.Name, p.Name ORDER BY Cnt DESC

Scenarios.Question: Which categories have more than 10 tickets?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT c.Name AS Category, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketCategories c ON c.Id = t.CategoryId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY c.Name HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY Cnt DESC

Scenarios.Question: List tickets sorted by created date, newest first.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title, CreatedAt FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY CreatedAt DESC

Scenarios.Question: Show me the 5 newest tickets.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 TicketNumber, Title, CreatedAt FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY CreatedAt DESC

Scenarios.Question: Show tickets with the username of their assignee.
Scenarios.Category: FK JOIN + projection of related column
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title, u.UserName FROM Tickets t LEFT JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.AssignedToUserId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Show users and their roles.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.UserName, r.Name AS Role FROM AspNetUsers u JOIN AspNetUserRoles ur ON ur.UserId = u.Id JOIN AspNetRoles r ON r.Id = ur.RoleId

Scenarios.Question: List users who have no tickets.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.UserName, u.Email FROM AspNetUsers u WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Tickets t WHERE t.AssignedToUserId = u.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0)

Scenarios.Question: Tickets created in the last 7 days.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title, CreatedAt FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(day, -7, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Show ticket counts per month for the last 3 months.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT FORMAT(CreatedAt,'yyyy-MM') AS Month, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(day,-90,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) AND IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY FORMAT(CreatedAt,'yyyy-MM') ORDER BY Month

Scenarios.Question: Show distinct ticket statuses currently in use.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT DISTINCT s.Name AS Status FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: List unassigned tickets.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title FROM Tickets WHERE AssignedToUserId IS NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Find tickets whose title contains 'login'.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title FROM Tickets WHERE Title LIKE '%login%' AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Average resolution time in hours.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT AVG(CAST(DATEDIFF(hour, CreatedAt, ResolvedAt) AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS AvgHours FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: What percentage of tickets are resolved or closed?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN s.Name IN ('Resolved','Closed') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0) AS PercentResolvedOrClosed FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Compare ticket counts this month vs last month.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN CreatedAt >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()),MONTH(GETDATE()),1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ThisMonth, SUM(CASE WHEN CreatedAt >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(DATEADD(month,-1,GETDATE())),MONTH(DATEADD(month,-1,GETDATE())),1) AND CreatedAt < DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()),MONTH(GETDATE()),1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS LastMonth FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Top 5 users by number of tickets created.
Scenarios.Category: TOP N + GROUP BY + COUNT + ORDER BY
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 u.UserName, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM AspNetUsers u JOIN Tickets t ON t.CreatedByUserId = u.Id WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY u.UserName ORDER BY Cnt DESC
